content:
💡 onWatch | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide developers with real-time and historical insights into their AI API quota consumption across various services, helping them manage usage and costs effectively.
✨ Key Features: • Real-time AI API quota tracking for multiple providers • Lightweight background daemon (<50MB RAM)
📖 Summary: onWatch is an open-source CLI tool and background agent that monitors AI API quota usage across multiple providers like Synthetic, Z.ai, Anthropic, Codex, GitHub Copilot, and Antigravity in real time. It stores historical data locally in SQLite and provides a Material Design 3 web dashboard for easy visualization, ensuring all data remains on the user's machine with zero telemetry.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
